title: Cuneiform Tablet #0992: Ur III Loan Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Loan Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records loan contract matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
